description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Schedule publication and manage post visibility
Schedule a blog post for publication at a specific date and time.
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

The HubSpot Blog Posts API enables you to manage blog posts programmatically. 
Create, update, publish, and schedule blog posts, manage drafts and revisions, 
handle multi-language content, and perform batch operations on multiple posts.

## Key Features
- Full CRUD operations for blog posts
- Publishing and scheduling capabilities
- Draft and revision management
- Multi-language support
- Batch operations for bulk management
- Post cloning functionality


Contact Support:
 Name: HubSpot Developer Support
